name: Midjourney
description: 最著名的AI图像生成工具，能创建高质量的艺术作品。

examples.prompt: A majestic dragon flying over a misty mountain at sunset, fantasy art style, highly detailed
Cyberpunk cityscape with neon lights, rainy streets, cinematic lighting

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI开发的强大图像生成工具，通过文字描述生成图片。

examples.prompt: A cozy cabin in the woods during a snowstorm, warm lights glowing through windows
An astronaut riding a horse on Mars, wearing a space suit, realistic photography

name: Stable Diffusion
description: 开源的AI图像生成工具，可以本地部署，高度可定制。

examples.prompt: Japanese garden in spring, cherry blossoms, traditional architecture, peaceful atmosphere
Steampunk mechanical owl with intricate gears, Victorian style, studio photography

name: Canva Magic Design
description: Canva的AI设计工具，快速创建专业的设计作品。

examples.prompt: Modern coffee shop social media post design, warm colors, friendly vibe
Professional business presentation template with clean design and blue accents

name: Notion AI
description: 集成在Notion中的AI助手，帮助写作、总结、翻译等。

examples.prompt: Summarize this 30-minute team meeting transcript into key action items and decisions
Organize and structure these scattered project notes into a clear, actionable plan

name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI的大语言模型，可以对话、写作、编程、分析等。

examples.prompt: Write a professional email to request a meeting with a potential client for a product demo
Draft a comprehensive blog post about the benefits of remote work for modern companies

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI编程助手，实时提供代码建议。

examples.prompt: Write a function to validate email addresses with regex in TypeScript
Refactor this messy Python script for better readability and performance

name: ElevenLabs
description: 高质量的AI语音生成工具，能创建逼真的语音。

examples.prompt: Create a deep, authoritative voiceover for a nature documentary about African wildlife
Generate a warm, friendly podcast intro with subtle background music

name: Runway ML
description: AI视频编辑和生成平台，专业视频制作工具。

examples.prompt: Remove the background from this video clip and replace with a futuristic cityscape
Transform this footage into a cinematic slow-motion sequence with color grading

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI搜索引擎，提供带有引用的准确回答。

examples.prompt: Research and summarize the latest trends in AI-powered productivity tools for 2026
Compare the features and pricing of top project management software with citations

name: Whisper
description: OpenAI的语音转文字工具，支持多种语言。

examples.prompt: Transcribe this 2-hour podcast episode into text with timestamps and speaker identification
Convert this Japanese audio file to English text with high accuracy

name: Pika Labs
description: AI视频生成工具，从文本创建动画视频。

examples.prompt: Generate a cartoon video of a cute robot dancing in a cyberpunk city
Create an animated scene of a cozy coffee shop with steam rising from cups

name: Cursor
description: 专为AI设计的代码编辑器，内置强大的Copilot功能。

examples.prompt: Debug this React component that's throwing a useState hook error
Explain this complex algorithm and suggest optimizations

name: Obsidian Copilot
description: Obsidian笔记软件的AI插件，增强知识管理。

examples.prompt: Connect and summarize related notes about machine learning from my vault
Extract key insights and create a mind map outline from this research paper

name: Suno AI
description: AI音乐生成工具，能根据文字描述创作歌曲。

examples.prompt: Create an upbeat pop song about summer vacation with catchy chorus and guitar melody
Generate a mellow jazz instrumental piece with piano and saxophone solo

name: Sora
description: OpenAI的最新视频生成模型，能创建高质量视频。

examples.prompt: Generate a video of a majestic whale swimming through bioluminescent deep ocean
Create a cinematic scene of a futuristic Tokyo street with flying cars and neon lights

name: Tabnine
description: AI代码补全工具，支持多种编程语言和IDE。

examples.prompt: Complete this C# async method for reading data from a database
Suggest test cases for this user authentication function

name: Jasper
description: 企业级AI写作平台，用于营销和内容创作。

examples.prompt: Generate a compelling product description for a new smartwatch with health monitoring features
Create engaging social media posts for a coffee brand launch campaign

name: Adobe Firefly
description: Adobe的创意AI工具，用于生成图像、文字效果等。

examples.prompt: Watercolor painting of a sunset over the ocean, soft brush strokes, warm colors
3D text effect "DREAM" floating in clouds, golden hour lighting, magical atmosphere

name: Claude
description: Anthropic的先进AI助手，擅长推理、写作、分析和编程任务。

examples.prompt: Write a thoughtful analysis of the ethical implications of artificial intelligence in healthcare
Draft a creative short story about a time traveler who accidentally changes history

name: Gemini
description: Google的多模态AI助手，能理解文本、图像、音频等。

examples.prompt: Write a research summary comparing renewable energy sources for a sustainability report
Create a detailed travel itinerary for a 7-day trip to Japan with cultural recommendations

name: Writesonic
description: AI写作平台，用于创建SEO优化的文章、博客和营销文案。

examples.prompt: Generate an SEO-optimized blog post about digital marketing strategies for small businesses
Write compelling meta descriptions and headlines for an e-commerce website selling organic skincare products

name: Rytr
description: AI写作助手，帮助快速创建高质量内容。

examples.prompt: Write a persuasive landing page copy for a SaaS project management tool
Create engaging video script ideas for a YouTube channel about personal finance

name: QuillBot
description: AI驱动的改写和写作工具，帮助提高词汇量和风格。

examples.prompt: Paraphrase this academic paragraph about climate change into a more casual and engaging tone
Expand and elaborate this brief bullet point summary into a comprehensive paragraph

name: VEED.io
description: AI-powered online video editing platform. Create, edit, and enhance videos with automatic subtitles, background removal, and voiceovers.

examples.prompt: Add automatic subtitles in English to this 5-minute product demo video and style them for social media
Remove the background from this interview footage and replace it with a professional office background

name: ClickUp AI
description: AI-powered project management assistant that enhances ClickUp with task creation, project planning, and workflow automation.

examples.prompt: Create a 12-week project plan for launching a new mobile app with tasks, milestones, and team assignments
Take these 15 messy meeting notes and organize them into actionable tasks with priorities and due dates

name: Todoist AI
description: AI-enhanced task management that automatically categorizes tasks, suggests priorities, and helps break down complex projects.

examples.prompt: I need to plan a wedding. Break this down into manageable tasks with priorities and suggested due dates
Categorize and prioritize these 20 random tasks and suggest which ones I should do first today

name: AutoGPT
description: 自主AI代理，能够自动完成复杂任务而无需人工提示。

examples.prompt: Research the best cities to start a tech company in 2026, create a comparison table, and draft a business plan outline
Plan a 3-week vacation to Europe with budget estimates, booking suggestions, and daily itinerary

name: AgentGPT
description: Web-based AI agent platform，让用户配置和部署自主AI代理。

examples.prompt: Create an agent to research and summarize the latest developments in quantum computing for a tech blog
Deploy an agent to monitor competitor pricing and send weekly summary reports

name: CrewAI
description: AI代理协作框架，让多个AI代理协同工作完成任务。

examples.prompt: Assemble a crew of AI agents to research, write, and edit a comprehensive e-book on sustainable living
Create a product development team with separate agents for market research, design, and technical specification

name: SurferSEO
description: AI驱动的SEO优化平台，帮助内容在搜索引擎中获得更好排名。

examples.prompt: Optimize this blog post about "remote work best practices" for top Google rankings with keyword recommendations
Analyze top-ranking competitors for "AI project management tools" and create a content strategy to outrank them

name: Frase
description: AI内容优化和研究平台，帮助创建SEO友好的高质量内容。

examples.prompt: Create a comprehensive content brief for a guide to 'starting an online business in 2026' with all key sections
Answer these 15 common questions about 'sustainable fashion' to create an FAQ section that ranks well

name: MarketMuse
description: AI内容智能平台，通过内容策略和优化提升有机搜索流量。

examples.prompt: Conduct a content audit of my website and identify gaps that are preventing me from ranking for key terms
Create a content cluster strategy for 'machine learning for beginners' to establish topical authority

name: Harvey
description: AI法律助手，帮助律师进行法律研究、合同审查和案例分析。

examples.prompt: Review this commercial lease agreement and flag potential issues and areas for negotiation
Research precedent cases about intellectual property disputes in the software industry

name: Robin AI
description: AI法律技术平台，自动化合同审查、起草和法律文档管理。

examples.prompt: Draft an employment contract for a senior software engineer position with standard clauses and protections
Compare these two NDA agreements and highlight the key differences and their implications

name: Kick
description: AI金融助手，帮助分析投资、优化投资组合和财务规划。

examples.prompt: Analyze my investment portfolio and suggest asset allocation adjustments based on my risk tolerance
Create a 5-year financial plan for saving for a house down payment with monthly savings targets

name: Khanmigo
description: Khan Academy的AI学习助手，提供个性化辅导和教育支持。

examples.prompt: Walk me through solving this calculus problem step by step and make sure I understand each concept
Create a 2-week study plan for my upcoming chemistry exam on organic chemistry reactions

name: Duolingo Max
description: AI驱动的语言学习平台，提供个性化课程和AI辅导。

examples.prompt: Practice a conversation in Spanish about ordering food at a restaurant with interactive feedback
Explain why I made this grammar mistake in French and give me similar examples to practice

name: Quizlet AI
description: AI增强的学习平台，智能生成抽认卡、测验和学习计划。

examples.prompt: Turn my biology textbook chapter on cell division into interactive flashcards with diagrams
Generate a practice test for my history exam on World War II with essay and multiple choice questions

Design an animated 3D logo for a tech startup that rotates and has a glowing effect

description: AI 3D内容创作平台，从文本或图像生成3D模型。

description: AI音乐生成器，为视频、播客和游戏创建免版税音乐。

Generate a calm ambient background track for meditation app with nature sounds
